assistant_intro: Hello, I am your AI interview assistant. This will be a practical engineer-to-engineer discussion. I will ask you 7 introductory to moderate questions tailored for Kotlin. This interview is configured in question mode. Expect a fresh mix focused on performance, reliability, and scalability. Answer naturally and clearly.

questions.question: How have you used Kotlin in real projects, and what makes you effective with it?
For a Fresher candidate, explain a introductory to moderate technical challenge you would expect in a candidate interview and how you would solve it.
You selected Kotlin. Which of these best matches your strengths and why?
As a Fresher Kotlin candidate, what topics should you be strongest in, and how would you demonstrate that in an interview?
What core fundamentals of Kotlin should a strong Fresher candidate understand before solving advanced problems?
expected_points: why fundamentals matter in real work

questions.question: Pick one of these focus areas: Kotlin. Explain its core fundamentals and where it is applied in practice.
expected_points: clear explanation of the chosen topic

questions.question: What core concepts and fundamentals should every Kotlin candidate be comfortable explaining confidently?

interview_variation.freshness_rule: Make this Kotlin interview feel fresh for seed 0c2b81 and avoid reusing stock boilerplate wording.

summary.summary: This was a technical AI interview session configured for a fresher experience level, focusing on Kotlin. The session was conducted in language mode and consisted of 10 questions. Without per-question evaluations, specific performance insights cannot be provided.
top_strengths: Completed the interview flow with spoken responses.
Covered several expected points across the session.
Showed willingness to explain experience verbally.
improvement_areas: Make answers more specific and evidence-based.
Tie each answer back to the target role or language.
